title: Kentrosiphon steingroeveri
taxonomy: Kentrosiphon steingroeveri is a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. It is native to Madagascar. The plant is classified as a member of the subfamily Asparagoideae. This classification is based on its botanical characteristics and phylogenetic relationships. Further research may be needed to fully understand its classification within the Asparagaceae family.
